title: Revolutionizing pharmacology: AI-powered approaches in molecular modeling and ADMET prediction
source: Pathan et al., Medicine in Drug Discovery, 2025

L2: AI-powered molecular modeling has revolutionized drug discovery by enhancing compound optimization and predictive analytics
Machine learning approaches improve ADMET prediction for more efficient pharmaceutical development
L3: Review of artificial intelligence approaches in computational pharmacology covering molecular modeling, ADMET prediction, and drug candidate optimization, examining how AI and machine learning are transforming pharmaceutical development pipelines
